prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime illustration of Rei as a powerful tiger beastman warrior, shown from upper thighs to head in a dramatic three-quarter pose. He is a tall, muscular adult male with a broad chest, defined abs, thick arms, tan skin with dark tiger stripes across the shoulders, arms, torso, and sides, large clawed hands, furry forearms, a long tiger tail, and two large pointed tiger ears emerging from messy windswept golden blond hair. His face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block over the facial area, leaving the hair, ears, neck, and body visible. Give him a strong heroic build with a slightly rounded natural jaw silhouette implied behind the censor, not a sharp V-shaped chin. Dress him in ornate black-and-gold fantasy armor and jewelry: open bare chest, black draped waist cloth, dark pants, gold filigree straps and chains crossing the torso and hips, metallic arm guards, claw-like gold accents, and turquoise gemstone ornaments at the chest, belt, and wrist. Surround him with intense blue-white lightning bolts and electric arcs wrapping around his body and crossing the foreground; use a stormy cosmic night background with deep navy clouds, sparks, glowing mist, and high-contrast rim lighting. Style: highly detailed Japanese fantasy character art, glossy skin highlights, intricate armor details, cinematic composition, dynamic wind-blown hair, dramatic chiaroscuro, luminous electric effects, sharp focus on the body and costume, vertical 2:3 poster framing, no text, no watermark.
